sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 3:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 3:1
items.html: By the restriction of NHY, the records contained in it rose with the screen to the Rosh of SAG, to Nikvey Einayim, which are phase one, and a level of phase one was extended, called MA and BON. When the coarseness of the Guf in the screen was recognized, it descended from there to its place in the Guf, which is the Tabur. This is regarded as the Katnut of Nekudim. (Inner Light, Item 10)
